# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-container
        image: <your-docker-image-name>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: MONGO_URI
          value: "mongodb://<username>:<password>@<mongo-instance>/nodejs-microservice"
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: "production"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: nodejs-config
          mountPath: /etc/nodejs/config
      volumes:
      - name: nodejs-config
        configMap:
          name: nodejs-config
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
